channel.title: Active Directory on Tony's Tech Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Active Directory on Tony's Tech Notes

item.title: CVE-2026-26128 — Kerberos Reflection Bypass: Detection & Mitigation
item.description: CVE-2026-26128 is a Kerberos authentication reflection bypass discovered by Synacktiv that yields SYSTEM on most Windows builds. Patched in March 2026 Patch Tuesday.

item.title: NTLM Coercion in Active Directory — Detection & Mitigation
item.description: What NTLM coercion is, what changed in Windows Server 2025, and how to detect and mitigate the risk in Active Directory environments.

item.title: Onelogon — Netlogon Vulnerable Channel Bypass
item.description: Vulnerability Overview, Exploitation Path & Remediation Guidance — Bypass del parche Zerologon via excepciones de compatibilidad legacy.
